results.term: Thank you. I am having problems with people making...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you. I am having problems with people making fun of my appearance. Why are people so mean?

results.term: Well, with covid, it's even harder to go talk to p...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Well, with covid, it's even harder to go talk to people. So, I don't think that's a good idea. I don't have a lot of money, so I can't buy fancy clothes. I don't think I can fix it.

results.term: I see a counselor regularly. The sessions are virt...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I see a counselor regularly. The sessions are virtual. I do wish there were some ways to figure out how to make the clothes I have look better or match better, be more organized with my wardrobe. I have a lot of problems with too many clothes that don't look good on me.

results.term: Yes! I love second hand stores! So I should not ca...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes! I love second hand stores! So I should not care so much what they say about me?

results.term: I agree. Those women were not even in shape. They ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I agree. Those women were not even in shape. They had makeup, hair done, etc., but they were not nice women. Maybe they are just taking their problems and insecurities out on me.

results.term: Yes. It does hurt. I want to get better at picking...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes. It does hurt. I want to get better at picking clothes that make me happy. A lot of my clothes are baggy. Maybe I could learn to sew and alter them.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have had that same exact problem! When I wear clothes that fit nicely, I do get complements. I think I will go through my wardrobe and find the best clothes I have and wear those.

results.term: Yes. It has been nice to talk to someone who has b...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes. It has been nice to talk to someone who has been through some of the same things.

results.term: Thank you. I hope you have a nice evening too!
